code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test26-JUL-2019Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, high chloride, and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, possibly acute or chronic kidney disease. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, glucosuria, mild ketonuria, and proteinuria, but no evidence of infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for possible renal insufficiency and underlying causes such as diabetes or glomerular disease.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
